image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan — PhD Researcher in Electrical Engineering, Professional Portrait
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan, PhD researcher in Electrical Engineering at UFRJ Rio de Janeiro, photographed in a professional navy blue suit portrait.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan at Academic Event — Electrical Engineer and PhD Researcher
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan attending an academic conference or presentation event, wearing a formal navy suit and tie, representing UFRJ research.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan in Research Lab at UFRJ — Computer Vision PhD Researcher
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan photographed in his research laboratory at the Federal University of Rio de Janeiro (UFRJ), with a whiteboard showing equations related to his Human Pose Estimation research.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan Playing Futevôlei in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan enjoying futevôlei, the iconic Brazilian beach sport combining football and volleyball, on the beaches of Rio de Janeiro during his PhD studies at UFRJ.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan PhD Portrait — Outdoor Waterfront Photo
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan in an outdoor portrait near a waterfront, photographed during his doctoral research period as a PhD candidate in Electrical Engineering.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan as Visiting Researcher at Rowan University, New Jersey, USA
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan photographed as a visiting researcher at Rowan University in New Jersey, USA, wearing formal academic attire during his international research collaboration.

image:image.image:title: Emre Can Aslan in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil — PhD Student at UFRJ
image:image.image:caption: Emre Can Aslan enjoying life in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, where he conducts his doctoral research in Human Pose Estimation and Computer Vision at UFRJ.
